title: ERROR: Assert `lut_slacks[node] >= 0' failed in passes/techmap/flowmap.cc:1295.
body:
## Steps to reproduce the issue

Using 
[flowmap_1295.tar.gz](https://github.com/YosysHQ/yosys/files/3806602/flowmap_1295.tar.gz), run `yosys -p "flowmap -maxlut 6 -optarea 4"  flowmap_1295.il`.

## Expected behavior

`flowmap` completes successfully.

## Actual behavior

```
2. Executing FLOWMAP pass (pack LUTs with FlowMap-r).
Labeling cells.
Mapped to 1 LUTs with maximum depth 1.

Optimizing area.
Relaxing with depth bound 1.
  Relaxed to 1 (+0) LUTs.
  Slack exhausted.
Relaxing with depth bound 2.
  Breaking LUT $auto$bugpoint.cc:222:simplify_something$247 to extract LUT $procmux$266.B_AND_S [10] (potential 150).
  Relaxed to 2 (+1) LUTs.
  Slack exhausted.
Relaxing with depth bound 3.
  Breaking LUT $auto$bugpoint.cc:222:simplify_something$247 to extract LUT \o_o [10] (potential 700).
  Breaking LUT $auto$bugpoint.cc:222:simplify_something$247 to extract LUT $auto$simplemap.cc:127:simplemap_reduce$342 [5] (potential 500).
  Breaking LUT $auto$bugpoint.cc:222:simplify_something$247 to extract LUT $auto$simplemap.cc:127:simplemap_reduce$351 [2] (potential 300).
  Breaking LUT $auto$bugpoint.cc:222:simplify_something$247 to extract LUT $auto$simplemap.cc:127:simplemap_reduce$356 [1] (potential 300).
  Breaking LUT $auto$simplemap.cc:127:simplemap_reduce$356 [1] to extract LUT $procmux$266.B_AND_S [10] (potential 150).
  Relaxed to 3 (+1) LUTs.
  Slack exhausted.
Relaxing with depth bound 4.
  Breaking LUT $auto$simplemap.cc:127:simplemap_reduce$356 [1] to extract LUT \o_o [10] (potential 700).
  Breaking LUT $auto$simplemap.cc:127:simplemap_reduce$356 [1] to extract LUT $auto$simplemap.cc:127:simplemap_reduce$342 [5] (potential 500).
  Breaking LUT $auto$simplemap.cc:127:simplemap_reduce$356 [1] to extract LUT $auto$simplemap.cc:127:simplemap_reduce$351 [2] (potential 300).
  Breaking LUT $auto$simplemap.cc:127:simplemap_reduce$351 [2] to extract LUT $procmux$266.B_AND_S [10] (potential 150).
  Relaxed to 4 (+1) LUTs.
  Slack exhausted.
Relaxing with depth bound 5.
  Breaking LUT $auto$simplemap.cc:127:simplemap_reduce$351 [2] to extract LUT \o_o [10] (potential 700).
  Breaking LUT $auto$simplemap.cc:127:simplemap_reduce$351 [2] to extract LUT $auto$simplemap.cc:127:simplemap_reduce$342 [5] (potential 500).
  Breaking LUT $auto$bugpoint.cc:222:simplify_something$247 to extract LUT $auto$simplemap.cc:256:simplemap_eqne$340 (potential 100).
  Breaking LUT $auto$simplemap.cc:256:simplemap_eqne$340 to extract LUT $procmux$266.B_AND_S [10] (potential 250).
  Breaking LUT $auto$simplemap.cc:256:simplemap_eqne$340 to extract LUT \o_o [10] (potential 900).
  Breaking LUT $auto$simplemap.cc:256:simplemap_eqne$340 to extract LUT $auto$simplemap.cc:127:simplemap_reduce$342 [5] (potential 700).
  Breaking LUT $auto$simplemap.cc:256:simplemap_eqne$340 to extract LUT $procmux$266.B_AND_S [26] (potential 100).
  Breaking LUT $auto$simplemap.cc:256:simplemap_eqne$340 to extract LUT \o_o [11] (potential 900).
  Breaking LUT $auto$simplemap.cc:127:simplemap_reduce$342 [5] to reuse LUT \o_o [11] (potential 450).
  Breaking LUT $auto$bugpoint.cc:222:simplify_something$247 to reuse LUT \o_o [11] (potential 500).
  Breaking LUT $auto$simplemap.cc:256:simplemap_eqne$340 to extract LUT $auto$simplemap.cc:127:simplemap_reduce$356 [1] (potential -100).
ERROR: Assert `lut_slacks[node] >= 0' failed in passes/techmap/flowmap.cc:1295.
```

cc @whitequark
